steps.name: basics
steps.label: Basics
steps.description: Create a new ACME client for certificate management

validations.message: You must have permission to create and update Key Vaults
You must have permission to create and update Azure Functions
You must have permission to create and update App Service Plans
You must have permission to create and update Storage Accounts
You must have permission to create and update Application Insights components
You must have permission to create and update Log Analytics workspaces
You must have permission to create role assignments for Key Vault access

location.label: Location
location.toolTip: Azure region where the Function App, Storage account, Key Vault, and monitoring resources are deployed.

elements.name: namingRule
elements.label: Naming rule
elements.toolTip: Choose how resource names are generated for Acmebot resources.

elements.name: appPrefix
elements.label: App prefix name
elements.toolTip: Short prefix used to generate resource names. Use lowercase letters, numbers, or hyphens; maximum 18 characters.

validations.message: Use 1 to 18 lowercase letters, numbers, or hyphens. Start and end with a letter or number, and avoid consecutive hyphens.

elements.name: functionAppName
elements.label: Function App name
elements.toolTip: Name of the Azure Functions app.

validations.message: Use 2 to 51 letters, numbers, or hyphens. Start and end with a letter or number, and avoid consecutive hyphens.

elements.name: appServicePlanName
elements.label: App Service plan name
elements.toolTip: Name of the App Service plan used by the Function App.

validations.message: Use 2 to 60 letters, numbers, or hyphens. Start and end with a letter or number.

elements.name: storageAccountName
elements.label: Storage account name
elements.toolTip: Name of the storage account used by the Function App.

validations.message: Use 3 to 24 lowercase letters or numbers.

elements.name: appInsightsName
elements.label: Application Insights name
elements.toolTip: Name of the Application Insights component.

validations.message: Use letters, numbers, or hyphens. Start and end with a letter or number.

elements.name: endpointType
elements.label: Endpoint type
elements.toolTip: Use a predefined ACME directory endpoint or enter the directory URL provided by your certificate authority.

elements.name: knownEndpoint
elements.label: Known ACME endpoint
elements.toolTip: Certificate authority ACME directory endpoint used to create the ACME account and issue certificates.

allowedValues.label: Let's Encrypt
allowedValues.description: Let's Encrypt ACME v2 production endpoint for publicly trusted certificates.

allowedValues.label: ZeroSSL
allowedValues.description: ZeroSSL ACME endpoint for 90-day DV certificates. EAB credentials are required.

allowedValues.label: Google Trust Services
allowedValues.description: Google Trust Services ACME endpoint for public TLS certificates.

allowedValues.label: SSL.com (RSA)
allowedValues.description: SSL.com ACME endpoint for DV certificates using RSA certificate keys.

allowedValues.label: SSL.com (ECC)
allowedValues.description: SSL.com ACME endpoint for DV certificates using ECC certificate keys.

allowedValues.label: Entrust
allowedValues.description: Entrust ACME endpoint for accounts enabled for Entrust certificate automation.

allowedValues.label: Global Sign
allowedValues.description: GlobalSign Atlas ACME endpoint for accounts enabled for certificate automation.

elements.name: customEndpoint
elements.label: Custom ACME endpoint
elements.toolTip: Full ACME directory URL for a certificate authority that is not listed above.

elements.name: mailAddress
elements.label: Mail address
elements.toolTip: Email address registered with the ACME account for certificate notices.

elements.name: credentialType
elements.label: Credential type
elements.toolTip: Select EAB only when your certificate authority requires external account binding.

elements.name: keyId
elements.label: Key ID
elements.toolTip: External Account Binding key identifier issued by your certificate authority.

elements.name: hmacKey
elements.toolTip: External Account Binding HMAC key issued by your certificate authority.

elements.name: algorithm
elements.label: HMAC algorithm
elements.toolTip: HMAC signing algorithm required by your certificate authority for EAB.

elements.name: providerType
elements.label: DNS provider
elements.toolTip: DNS provider used to create and remove ACME DNS-01 challenge TXT records.

allowedValues.label: Akamai Edge DNS
allowedValues.description: Use Akamai Edge DNS with EdgeGrid API credentials.

allowedValues.label: Amazon Route 53
allowedValues.description: Use Amazon Route 53 with AWS access keys or an IAM role assumed by managed identity.

allowedValues.label: Azure DNS
allowedValues.description: Use Azure public DNS zones in the selected subscription.

allowedValues.label: Azure Private DNS
allowedValues.description: Use Azure Private DNS zones in the selected subscription.

allowedValues.label: Cloudflare
allowedValues.description: Use Cloudflare with a scoped API token.

allowedValues.label: Custom DNS
allowedValues.description: Use an HTTP API compatible with Acmebot custom DNS endpoints.

allowedValues.label: DNS Made Easy
allowedValues.description: Use DNS Made Easy with an API key and secret key.

allowedValues.label: Gandi LiveDNS
allowedValues.description: Use Gandi LiveDNS with an API key.

allowedValues.label: GoDaddy
allowedValues.description: Use GoDaddy with an API key and secret.

allowedValues.label: Google Cloud DNS
allowedValues.description: Use Google Cloud DNS with a base64-encoded service account key file.

allowedValues.label: IONOS DNS
allowedValues.description: Use IONOS DNS with an API key.

allowedValues.label: OVH
allowedValues.description: Use OVH with an application key, application secret, and consumer key.

allowedValues.label: PowerDNS
allowedValues.description: Use a PowerDNS Authoritative server with the HTTP API enabled.

allowedValues.label: Regfish
allowedValues.description: Use Regfish with an API key.

allowedValues.label: TransIP DNS
allowedValues.description: Use TransIP DNS with a customer name and Key Vault key name.

allowedValues.label: UnitedDomains
allowedValues.description: Use UnitedDomains with an API key.

elements.name: subscriptionId
elements.label: Subscription ID
elements.toolTip: Azure subscription ID that contains the public DNS zones Acmebot manages.

validations.message: Enter a valid Azure subscription ID.

elements.name: subscriptionId
elements.label: Subscription ID
elements.toolTip: Azure subscription ID that contains the private DNS zones Acmebot manages.

validations.message: Enter a valid Azure subscription ID.

elements.name: host
elements.label: Host
elements.toolTip: Akamai EdgeGrid API host name.

elements.name: clientToken
elements.toolTip: Akamai EdgeGrid client token.

elements.name: clientSecret
elements.toolTip: Akamai EdgeGrid client secret.

elements.name: accessToken
elements.toolTip: Akamai EdgeGrid access token.

elements.name: credentialType
elements.label: Credential type
elements.toolTip: Choose how Acmebot authenticates to Amazon Route 53.

elements.name: roleArn
elements.label: Role ARN
elements.toolTip: AWS IAM role ARN assumed through STS AssumeRoleWithWebIdentity using the Function App managed identity.

validations.message: Enter a valid AWS IAM role ARN.

elements.name: accessKey
elements.label: Access key ID
elements.toolTip: AWS access key ID used for Route 53 DNS operations.

elements.name: secretKey
elements.toolTip: AWS secret access key used for Route 53 DNS operations.

elements.name: apiToken
elements.toolTip: Cloudflare API token with permissions to manage DNS records for the target zones.

elements.name: endpoint
elements.label: Endpoint
elements.toolTip: Base URL of the custom DNS API endpoint.

validations.message: Enter a valid HTTPS endpoint URL.

elements.name: apiKey
elements.toolTip: API key sent to the custom DNS API endpoint.

elements.name: apiKeyHeaderName
elements.label: API key header name
elements.toolTip: HTTP header name used to send the custom DNS API key.

validations.message: Use only letters, numbers, and hyphens.

elements.name: propagationSeconds
elements.label: Propagation seconds
elements.toolTip: Seconds to wait after creating DNS challenge records before validation starts.

validations.message: Enter a positive number of seconds.

elements.name: apiKey
elements.toolTip: DNS Made Easy API key.

elements.name: secretKey
elements.toolTip: DNS Made Easy secret key.

elements.name: apiKey
elements.toolTip: Gandi LiveDNS API key.

elements.name: apiKey
elements.toolTip: GoDaddy API key.

elements.name: apiSecret
elements.toolTip: GoDaddy API secret.

elements.name: keyFile64
elements.toolTip: Base64-encoded Google Cloud service account key JSON used for Cloud DNS operations.

elements.name: apiKey
elements.toolTip: IONOS DNS API key.

elements.name: applicationKey
elements.toolTip: OVH application key.

elements.name: applicationSecret
elements.toolTip: OVH application secret.

elements.name: consumerKey
elements.toolTip: OVH consumer key.

elements.name: endpoint
elements.label: API endpoint
elements.toolTip: Full base URL of the PowerDNS HTTP API, including /api/v1/.

validations.message: Enter a valid http(s) URL.

elements.name: apiKey
elements.toolTip: PowerDNS HTTP API key sent in the X-API-Key header.

elements.name: serverId
elements.label: Server ID
elements.toolTip: PowerDNS server identifier (path segment after /servers/). Defaults to localhost.

elements.name: apiKey
elements.toolTip: Regfish API key.

elements.name: customerName
elements.label: Customer name
elements.toolTip: TransIP customer name used to authenticate DNS API requests.

elements.name: privateKeyName
elements.label: Private key name
elements.toolTip: Name of the Key Vault key that contains the TransIP private key.

elements.name: apiKey
elements.toolTip: UnitedDomains API key.

elements.name: identityType
elements.label: Managed identity type
elements.toolTip: Managed identity Acmebot uses to access Key Vault and related Azure resources.

elements.name: userAssignedSelector
elements.label: Select user assigned identity
elements.toolTip: Existing user-assigned managed identity to attach to the Function App.

elements.name: createNew
elements.label: Create new Key Vault
elements.toolTip: Create a new Key Vault for certificates or use an existing vault.

elements.name: keyVaultName
elements.label: Key Vault name
elements.toolTip: Name of the new Key Vault where Acmebot stores and renews certificates.

validations.message: Use 3 to 24 letters, numbers, or hyphens. Start with a letter, end with a letter or number, and avoid consecutive hyphens.

elements.name: keyVaultSelector
elements.label: Select key vault
elements.toolTip: Existing Key Vault where Acmebot stores and renews certificates.

elements.name: createNew
elements.label: Create new Log analytics workspace
elements.toolTip: Create a new Log Analytics workspace for Application Insights or use an existing workspace.

elements.name: logAnalyticsWorkspaceName
elements.label: Log Analytics workspace name
elements.toolTip: Name of the new Log Analytics workspace used by Application Insights for Acmebot logs.

validations.message: Use 4 to 63 letters, numbers, or hyphens. Start and end with a letter or number.

elements.name: logAnalyticsSelector
elements.label: Select log analytics workspace
elements.toolTip: Existing Log Analytics workspace used by Application Insights for Acmebot logs.
